title: IIM Indore IPMAT Answer Key 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: IIM Indore IPMAT Answer Key 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: IPMAT Indore Answer Key 2026 Released for IPM Aptitude Test on the official website - iimidr.ac.in on 11th May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the IIM Indore IPMAT answer key and response sheet.

content.text: Indian Institute of Management Indore has officially released the IPMAT Indore Answer Key 2026 for the Integrated Programme in Management Aptitude Test conducted for admission to the 5-year IPM course. The provisional answer key and response sheet are now available online for candidates who appeared in the exam. IPMAT Indore Answer Key 2026 has been released online on the official website - iimidr.ac.in.

Candidates can log in using their application number and password to download the provisional answer key, view their marked responses, and calculate their expected IPMAT score before the result is announced. After checking the responses, candidates should carefully verify question-wise answers and use the official objection window to challenge any discrepancies within the specified dates.

sections.heading: IIM Indore IPMAT Answer Key 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: IIM Indore has published the provisional IPMAT Indore answer key 2026 along with the response sheet for all candidates who appeared in the IPM Aptitude Test. The answer key has been released for the IPM UG entrance exam, and candidates can use it to estimate their probable scores and plan for further selection rounds. Students can access the IPMAT answer key and response sheet from the official website by logging into the candidate portal using their registered credentials.

sections.heading: IPMAT Indore Answer Key 2026 Direct Link

content.text: IIM Indore has activated the direct links to access the IPMAT Indore answer key 2026 and response sheet on the official website iimidr.ac.in. Candidates can use the direct links given below to log in, download the provisional answer key PDF, view their response sheet, and calculate their expected scores. The IPMAT answer key download link helps candidates quickly check their question-wise responses and prepare for the next stages of the admission process.

links.label: IPMAT Indore Answer Key 2026 - IIM Indore

sections.heading: How to Check IPMAT Indore Answer Key 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download the IPMAT Indore answer key 2026 from the official website:

items: Visit the official IIM Indore website iimidr.ac.in.
Click on the IPMAT 2026 or Admissions section visible on the homepage.
Open the IPMAT candidate login or answer key link.
Enter your application number and password or date of birth as required.
Click on the IPMAT answer key or response sheet option on the dashboard.
View the provisional answer key on the screen and check your question-wise responses.
Download the answer key and response sheet PDF for score calculation and future reference.
